title: Cholibrium — Mi rutina a los 55 (testimonial v2)
scenePrompt: Real lived-in home kitchen interior in the morning, empty (no people): warm wood cabinets, soft natural window light from the left, coffee mug and french press on the counter, shallow depth of field, photoreal, vertical 9:16, authentic and slightly imperfect, no text, no logos, no watermark

lock.outfit: Dark gray casual henley shirt, slightly worn-in, no logos or accessories.
lock.background: Warm wood cabinets, coffee mug out of focus on the counter, authentic slightly imperfect kitchen.
lock.lighting: Soft natural window light from the left, morning warmth, no studio or ring light.
lock.camera: Handheld front-camera selfie at arm's length, chest-up, slightly off-center, subtle natural shake, looks self-filmed on a phone.
lock.emotionArc: Shot 1 honest and slightly vulnerable → shot 2 quietly enthusiastic → shot 3 warm, relaxed, zero salesman energy.
lock.gestures: One hand always implied holding the phone; free hand does natural micro-gestures only; hands stay EMPTY the whole ad: no bottle, no product, no props.

shots.name: Shot 1 · hook/dolor
shots.prompt: UGC testimonial talking-head, selfie style. @Image1 is the creator holding the phone at arm's length, talking directly into the lens, sincere and slightly vulnerable. On the word "honest" he leans in a touch closer. Natural micro-gestures with his free hand, small head movements, authentic pauses matching the audio.
shots.script: I'm fifty-five, and I finally got honest about my health. Coffee wasn't fixing my afternoons anymore. Something had to change.

shots.name: Shot 2 · descubrimiento
shots.prompt: UGC testimonial talking-head, selfie style — direct continuity with the previous shot. @Image1 glances briefly off-camera as if recalling the moment, then returns his eyes to the lens and gives a small confident nod on the word "steadier".
shots.script: A buddy put me onto Cholibrium — functional mushrooms. It's just part of my morning now. Two weeks in? Steadier all day.

shots.name: Shot 3 · cierre/CTA
shots.prompt: UGC testimonial talking-head, selfie style — closing shot, continuity locked. @Image1 delivers his closing line relaxed and warm: a soft self-aware half-laugh after "myself", then an open relaxed palm gesture with his free hand on "that's all", holding eye contact with the lens to the end.
shots.script: I'm not saying it's magic. I'm saying I feel more like myself again. Link's below if you're curious — that's all.
